summary: Normalizes an optional configuration object into a complete serialization configuration with validation and defaults.
signature_intent: Accepts an optional settings object and returns either the shared default configuration or a normalized configuration object.
behavior: Returns the default configuration when no settings object is provided.
Rejects a supplied encoding callback unless it is callable or nullish.
Uses the provided text encoding when valid, otherwise falls back to the default encoding.
Accepts only utf-8, iso-8859-1, or an omitted text encoding.
Uses the selected formatting function in the returned configuration.
Uses a supplied filtering rule only when it is callable or an array.
Normalizes boolean feature flags by accepting booleans directly and otherwise applying documented fallbacks.
Uses supplied delimiter and sorting callback when valid according to their expected types.
Uses a supplied date serialization callback only when callable.
edge_cases: A null or undefined settings object returns defaults without further validation.
A null custom encoding callback is accepted and replaced by the default callback.
Invalid text encoding throws TypeError even if a fallback value would otherwise exist.
An unknown formatting choice throws TypeError.
Non-callable filtering values are ignored unless they are arrays.
Non-boolean flag values are coerced only for the dot-notation setting; other flags use defaults.
A non-callable sorting value becomes null.
